[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up cartoon-style portrait shows a person wearing a large yellow hat and a red collared garment, with a smiling face and simple linework against a pale wall background.  

Main Subject:  
The main focus is a stylized, close-up character with light skin, short dark hair visible under a broad yellow hat with bold black line accents. The character wears a red collared garment and has a wide open-mouth smile showing red inside the mouth, with a curved white highlight near the lower lip. The face includes minimal black facial linework, including a small line under one eye and short eyebrow lines, and the nose and cheeks are outlined with simplified shading.  

Setting:  
The background appears to be a light, beige or off-white wall with rectangular paneling or blocks, shown out of focus and partially cropped by the character’s head and hat. The scene is indoors or at least not outdoors; lighting looks flat and even, consistent with a drawn or illustrated image.  

Visual Details:  
The hat dominates the upper left portion of the image, drawn with a thick red band across the middle and black line marks suggesting texture or shading. Yellow and orange tones fill most of the hat, while the red clothing and red mouth interior provide strong contrast. The character’s head is tilted slightly, and the viewpoint is tight and angled slightly from the left side. The illustration uses clean, thick outlines and stylized, comic shading with short black stroke marks.  

Visible Text:  
No important visible text detected.  

Practical Summary:  
The image is a stylized, close-up cartoon of a smiling person wearing a large yellow hat with a red band and a red collared outfit. The character’s face and hat fill most of the frame, with a simple paneled wall background behind them.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text found in the provided screenshot.]

# Structured Version

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
